title: carandas edulis
intro: Carandas edulis, also known as the carandas tree or carandas cherry, is a tropical tree native to the Philippines and parts of Southeast Asia. Its bark, leaves, and fruit have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of carandas edulis include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as reducing pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of carandas edulis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures made from its bark, leaves, and fruit, which can be used to create topical creams, ointments, and salves.
